title: Better Death Messages Pack
description: Replaces boring Minecraft death messages with fun unique ones!
body:
![Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bad8f86ae7ba89991fed581ec8e85b7e7984730a.png)
# 💀Better Death Messages💀
Ever feel like when you die you're greeted with a plain old death screen? Well, this mod aims to change that! All death messages are now changed to be fun, snarky, and/or a reference.


**Supported Languages:**
- English (US)
- English (United Kingdom)
- German (German)
- German (Dutch)
- French (France)
- Spanish (Spanin)
- Italian (Italia)
- Polish (Poland)
- Czech (Czech)
- Portuguese (Europe/Portuguese)
- Hungarian (Hungary)

## Other
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de7f2f606702569cd98fc1f6a0b29dbf817dd870.png)](https://discord.gg/T5mMeaBDbY) [![PayPal](https://i.postimg.cc/YSdtnDpH/Donate-to-us-on-Pay-Pal.png)](https://paypal.me/BlockMiner2k)
- If you find a bug or would like to suggest somehting, do so on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/T5mMeaBDbY).
- I'm also looking for someone to help me out with the mod so DM me if your intrested.
- A special thanks to [GamerNation12](https://modrinth.com/user/1oUQ66DR).
- Also check out the [Mod Version](https://modrinth.com/mod/better_death_messages)
